notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, third baseman Eugenio Suárez to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Spencer Steer. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to right fielder Noelvi Marte.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Tony Santillan picks off Jarren Duran at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder TJ Friedl.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela lines out to left fielder TJ Friedl.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Dane Myers out at 2nd. Tyler Stephenson out at 1st.
